description_long: This hammer features a robust, dark metallic construction with a distinctive, aggressive design. The head is double-sided, with one end forming a sharp, elongated spike and the other a shorter, conical point, suggesting a specialized function beyond standard hammering. The handle is straight, slender, and tapers to a pointed end, with subtle geometric detailing along its length. The entire object has a matte black finish, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, and the surface appears uniformly hard and smooth. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for heavy-duty or specialized urban tasks.
description: A matte black, double-sided hammer with a spiked and pointed head, featuring a straight, detailed handle and a modern, tactical look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated spike on one end and the conical point on the other, with the full handle visible.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the head and the pointed tip, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, clearly displaying both the spike and point of the head.
description_view_3: Rear end-on view showing the back of the head and the alignment of the handle, with the pointed end visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight steel handle with subtle geometric detailing, smooth and matte, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided specialized head with one elongated spike and one conical point, resembling a tactical or demolition hammer.
